name: klist
description: Reads and displays the current tickets in the credential cache (also known as the ticket file)

options.description: Test for there being an active and valid TGT for the local realm of the user in the credential cache
Display v5 cred cache (this is the default)
Include ticket flags in short form, each character stands for a specific flag
Verbose output. Include all possible information
List the credential caches for the current users, not all cache types supports listing multiple caches
